description: Ashby provides recruiting and hiring software, including applicant tracking, job boards, applications, interviews, and related hiring workflows. Its public documentation covers programmatic access to hiring data and job postings.
summary: Ashby exposes two developer-facing HTTP APIs on ashbyhq.com: an authenticated RPC-style Ashby API at https://api.ashbyhq.com using Basic auth with an API key, and a public Job Postings API at https://api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/{JOB_BOARD_NAME}; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
